title: Set up TanStack Table (React Table v8) for data tables
summary: Install @tanstack/react-table, define type-safe ColumnDef columns, implement sorting, filtering, and pagination, and render a fully accessible data table.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Table v8 (@tanstack/react-table) for a sortable, filterable, paginated data table. This is a headless library — you bring your own UI. I will provide a full working example. If you are using shadcn/ui, say so and I will follow the shadcn DataTable pattern instead.
